allow:
Bash(git -C "E:/product" add backend/package.json worker/package.json frontend/package.json frontend/package-lock.json frontend/vite.config.ts backend/test/promptGenerator.test.ts worker/test/parser-utils.test.ts frontend/src/i18n.test.ts && git -C "E:/product" commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test: add baseline test setup across backend, worker, and frontend

Introduce low-friction test scripts and minimal smoke tests so each package can run CI-friendly checks with existing tooling and verify core pure-module behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git -C "E:/product" status --short)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" branch --list test/test-setup-pr && git -C "E:/product" branch -r --list origin/test/test-setup-pr)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git -C "E:/product" fetch origin)

Bash(git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" status -sb && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" checkout main && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" pull --ff-only origin main && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" merge --no-ff origin/test-setup-pr -m "Merge pull request: add baseline test setup across packages" && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" push origin main)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" rev-parse HEAD && git -C "E:/product" rev-parse origin/main && git -C "E:/product" rev-parse origin/test-setup-pr)

Bash(git -C "E:/product" add backend/src/services/run.processor.ts && git -C "E:/product" commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix: remove hardcoded AI API key fallback

Require engine API keys from environment variables only and fail fast when a key is missing to prevent embedded secret usage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)" && git -C "E:/product" push)

Bash(git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" status -sb && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD && git -C "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" log --oneline -3)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" branch --list merge-test-setup-pr && git -C "E:/product" worktree add -b "merge-test-setup-pr" "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/merge-test-setup-pr" origin/main)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" push origin --delete test-setup-pr && git -C "E:/product" branch -D test-setup-pr merge-test-setup-pr)
Bash(git -C "E:/product" worktree remove "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/test-setup-pr" && git -C "E:/product" worktree remove "E:/product/.claude/worktrees/merge-test-setup-pr")
Bash(grep -r "Share of Model\\|SoM" --include=*.ts --include=*.tsx backend/ frontend/ worker/)
